question: Rs.5750 is divided among A, B, and C such that if their share be reduced by Rs 10, Rs 15 and Rs 25 respectively, the reminder amounts with them shall be in the ratio 4 : 6 : 9. What was C’s share then?
Seats for English, Sanskrit and Hindi in a school are in the ratio 5 : 7: 8. There is a proposal to increase these seats by 40%, 50% and 75% respectively. What will be the ratio of increased seats?
Gold is 17 times as heavy as water and copper is 7 times as heavy as water. In what ratio should these mixed to get an alloy 13 times as heavy as water?

Three containers have their volumes in the ratio 2 : 3 : 4. They are full of mixtures of milk and water. The mixtures contain milk and water in the ratio of ( 1 : 3), ( 2 : 1) and ( 5 : 2) respectively. The contents of all these three containers are poured into a fourth container. The ratio of milk and water in the fourth container is:

A school has 4 sections of class 12, such that half the number of students of 1st section, 1/3rd of 2nd section, 1/4th of 3rd section and 1/5th of the 4th section are equal. If total number of students in class 12 is 420, find the number of students in sections 1st and 2nd.
If Rs. 680 divided among Anil, Bimal and Chandan in such a way that Anil gets 2/3 of what Bimal gets and Bimal gets 1/4 of what Chandan gets, then find the share of Bimal.

Direction :
There are N numbers of chocolates in the house, in which four people are lived. If the first men woke up and divided the chocolates in to 5 equal piles and found one extra chocolate. He took one of those piles along with the extra chocolate and hid them. He then gathered the 4 remaining piles in to a big pile, woke up the second person and went to sleep. Each of the other three persons did the same one by one. i.e. divided the big piles and found one extra chocolate. Each hid one of the piles along with the extra chocolate and gathered the remaining 4 piles in to a big pile.
If N> 1000, what could be the last value of N?

The ratio of the incomes of A and B last year was 9 : 13. Ratio of their incomes of last year to this year is 9 : 10 and 13 : 15 respectively. The sum of their present incomes is Rs 50,000. What is the present income of B?
A sum of Rs 315 consists of 25 paise, 50 paise and 1 Re coins in the ratio 3 : 4 :6. What is the number of each kind of coin respectively?

A and B are two alloys of gold and copper prepared by mixing metals in the ratio 5 : 4 and 5 : 6 respectively. If equal quantities of the alloys are melted to form a third alloy C, the ratio of gold and copper in C will be:
A, B and C play cricket. A's runs are to B's runs and B's runs are to C's as 4:5. They get altogether 488 runs. How many runs did A make?

Direction :
There are N numbers of chocolates in the house, in which four people are lived. If the first men woke up and divided the chocolates in to 5 equal piles and found one extra chocolate. He took one of those piles along with the extra chocolate and hid them. He then gathered the 4 remaining piles in to a big pile, woke up the second person and went to sleep. Each of the other three persons did the same one by one. i.e. divided the big piles and found one extra chocolate. Each hid one of the piles along with the extra chocolate and gathered the remaining 4 piles in to a big pile.
What is the sum of the number of chocolates hidden by the last two men?

The electricity bill of a certain establishment is partly fixed and partly varies as the number of units of electricity consumed. When in a certain month 520 units are consumed the bill is Rs. 1600. In another month 600 units are consumed and the bill is Rs. 1840. In yet another month 450 units are consumed. The bill for that month would be:

In a survey of political preferences, 85% of those asked were in favour of at least one of the proposal I, II and III. 62% of those asked favoured proposal I, 30% favoured proposal II and 20% favoured III. If 8% of those asked favoured all three of the proposals, what percentage of those asked favoured more than one of the three proposals.
The proportion of milk and water in 3 samples is 4:3, 3:2 and 5:3. A mixture comprising of equal quantities of all 3 samples is made. The proportion of milk and water in the mixture is
There are two numbers. When 25% of the first number is added to the second number, the resultant number is 1.5times the first number. What is the ratio of 1st number to the 2nd number?
There is a square of side a cm. A circle is inscribed inside the square. Find the ratio of the area of circle to square.
A sum of Rs 1162 is divided among A,B and C. Such that 4 times A's share  is equal to 5 times B's share and 7 times C's share . What is the share of C?

One year ago the ratio between rahul salary and rohit salary is 4:5. The ratio between their individual salary of the last year and current year is 2:3 and 3:5 respectively. If the total current salary of rahul and rohit is 4300. Then find the current salary of rahul.
Section A and section B of 7th class in a school contains total 285 students. Which of the following can be a ratio of the ratio of the number of boys and number of girls in the class?
A sum of 12600 is to be distributed between A, B and C. For every rupee A gets, B gets 80p and for every rupee B gets, C get 90 paise. Find the amount get by C.

The pressure of wind on a sail varies directly as the area of the sail and the square of the velocity of the wind. The pressure on one square meter is I unit when the velocity is 9 km/hr. Find the velocity of the wind where the pressure on a square meter is 16 units is :
A is directly proportional to B and also directly proportional to C. When B = 6 and C = 2, A = 24. Find the value of A when B = 8 and C = 3.
If A : B = 3 : 4, C : B = 5 : 4, C : D = 10 : 9, then A : B : C : D is:

Mohan, Ranjeet and Bhupesh have some stone with each of them. Five times the number of stones with Ranjeet equals seven times the number of stones with Mohan while five times the number of stones with Mohan is equal seven times the number of stones with Bhupesh. What is the minimum number of stone that can be there with all three of them put together?
If Rs.  850 be divided into three parts, proportional to 1/3 : 2/5:3/5, then first part is :
The ratio between two numbers is 7:5. If 5 is subtracted from each of them, the new ratio becomes 3:5. Find the numbers.

There are 2 containers of equal capacity. The ratio of milk to water in the first container is 4:5 and in the second container is 3:7. If they are mixed up then the ratio of milk to water in the mixture will be ----------.
The ratio between two numbers is 5:6 and their L.C.M is 240. Find the sum of the numbers.

The ratio of income of A and B is 2:3. The sum of their expenditure is Rs.8000 and the amount of savings of A is equal to the amount of expenditure of B.What is the their ratio of  sum of income to their sum of savings?
If y varies directly as x, and y = 24 when x = 16, find y when x = 12.
If The ratio of A's money and B's money is 3 : 7 and ratio of B's money and C's money is  2 : 1. If A has Rs. 600 with him, C has ______.

George bought two varieties of wheat, costing Rs 25 per kg and Rs. 30 per kg each, and mixed them in the same ratio. The he sold the mixture at Rs. 35 per kg, making a profit of 20%. What was the ratio of the mixture?
Find third proportion to 16,36

A bus and a truck are available to cross a forest. The speed of the truck is twice that of the bus. The capacity of truck is 60 persons and that of bus is 40 persons. The average occupancy of the bus is twice that of the truck. The ticket of the bus and the truck cost Re. 1 and Rs. 1.50 respectively. What is the ratio of the average rupee collection of the truck to that of the bus in a day? Assume there is no wastage time between the trips and occupancy of the bus or truck is defined as the ratio of the actual number of persons boarding it and its capacity.

A yellow light flashes 3 times per minutes and a red light flashes 5 times in two minutes at regular intervals. If both lights starts flashing at the same time, how many times do they flash together in each hour?
Ratio of A and B is in the ratio 5 : 8. After 6 years, the ratio of ages of A and B will be in the ratio 17 : 26. Find the present age of B.
A bag contains 25p, 50p and 1Re coins in the ratio of 2 : 4 : 5 respectively. If the total money in the bag is Rs 75, find the number of 50p coins in the bag.
A bag contains one rupee coins,50 paise coins,and 25 paise coins in the ratio of 1:2:4.T he total sum is Rs 300. Find the total number of coins?
Divide Rs.2340 into three parts, such that first part be double that of second part and second part be 1/3 of the third part.Find the Third part amount?

Two alloys contain platinum and gold in the ratio of 1:2 and 1:3 respectively. A third alloy C is formed by mixing alloys one and alloy two in the ratio of 3:4. Find the percentage of gold in the mixture?
If Rs. 783 is divided into two parts in the ratio 1 : 2 then find the second part.
When 40% percent of a number is added to another number the second number increases to its 20%. What is the ratio between the first and second number?
A company reduces his employee in the ratio 14 : 12 and increases their wages in the ratio 16:18, Determine whether the bill of wages increases or not and in what ratio.
Divide 1458 in the ratio of 2:7
If Rs. 656 is divided into two parts in the ratio 3 : 5 then find the first part.
Two alloys contain copper and tin in the ratio of 5:6 and 7:11 which one of them contain more copper?
If a:b = 2:3, b:c = 6:5 and c:d = 3:5 then find the value of a:b:c:d?
The population of a city is 1152 crores. The ratio of male, female and children are 2:3:4. Find the number of males, females and children in the city?
If 15 books cost Rs.35, what do 21 books cost?
The ratio between two numbers is 3:4. If each no is increase by 2, the ratio becomes 7:9. Find the numbers
If a : b = 4 : 3 and b : c = 9 : 8, then a : c is :
The ratio of boys and girls in the school is 7:9 when 22 new boys  are joined in this school  then the ratio become 9:10.How many girls in this school?
If a : b = 2 : 5 and b : c = 4 :5, find a : b : c.
If Rs. 936 is divided into two parts in the ratio 5 : 4 then find the first part.
If a = 3b = 5c, then a : b : c is :
Two numbers are in the ratio of 5:8 .If 4 is subtracted from each then the ratio become 1:2. The small number is ------.
465 coins consist of 1 rupee, 50 paise and 25 paise coins. Their values are in the ratio 5:3:1. Find the number of each coin?
If a/2 = b/3 = c/4, then a : b : c is :
The sum of present age of 2 persons is 100yrs.Before 5 years the ratio of their ages is 5:13. Find the age of younger person?
